# Dev Toolbox

Canonical URL: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/

Dev Toolbox is an open-source, offline-first developer toolbox. Tools run client-side in the browser for privacy and airgapped usability. No user input is uploaded to a server by the application.

## Categories

- Productivity: timers and scheduling helpers.
- Cryptography: encoding, hashing, signatures, fingerprints, JWTs, and certificate inspection.
- Time: timestamps, timezones, relative time, and date calculations.
- Number: bases, binary values, IPv4, and Unix permissions.
- Graphics: image, color, contrast, metadata, and QR tools.
- Network: URL parsing, HTTP request helpers, and OpenAPI viewing.
- Misc: text, structured data, IDs, diffs, regex, and reference utilities.

## Tools

- Pomodoro: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/pomodoro/
- Cron Tab Helper + Visualizer: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/cron/
- Levenshtein Distance Calculator: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/levenshtein/
- URI Encoder / Decoder: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/uri/
- HTML Encoder / Decoder: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/html/
- Base64 Encoder / Decoder: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/base64/
- Hashers for MD5, SHA1, SHA256, SHA512, and RIPEMD-160: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/hashers/
- JWT Helper: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/jwt/
- Hash Verifier: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/hash-verifier/
- HMAC Generator: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/hmac/
- SSH Key Fingerprint: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/ssh-fingerprint/
- TLS Certificate Decoder: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/tls-cert/
- Timestamp to Time: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/timestamp/
- Timezone Converter: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/timezone/
- Relative Time Calculator: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/relative-time/
- Change Base Helper: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/base/
- IPv4 Helper: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/ipv4/
- Binary Helper: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/binary/
- Unix Permission Calculator: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/unix-permissions/
- Image Helper: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/image-helper/
- Color Picker: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/color-picker/
- Color Shades Generator: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/color-shades/
- QR Code Generator + Reader: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/qr/
- Color Contrast Checker: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/color-contrast/
- Image Metadata Viewer: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/image-metadata/
- URL Parser: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/url-parser/
- OpenAPI/Swagger Viewer: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/openapi/
- ASCII Reference Table: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/ascii-table/
- Help me I'm stuck in Vim!: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/vim-help/
- File Diff + Patch Viewer: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/diff-viewer/
- Lorem Ipsum Generator: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/lorem-ipsum/
- JSON Formatter/Minifier + JSONPath: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/json/
- YAML to JSON Converter: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/yaml-json/
- CSV to JSON Converter: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/csv-json/
- XML Formatter + XPath Tester: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/xml/
- UUID/ULID/KSUID Generator: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/id-generator/
- Regex Tester + Explainer: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/regex/
- Text Case Converter + Slugify: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/text-case/
- Base-N Encoders: https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/tools/base-n-encoders/

## Crawling Notes

Use https://dtdg.fr/dev-toolbox/sitemap.xml for the canonical URL list. Tool pages include structured metadata and visible descriptions for input, output, use cases, and privacy behavior.
